Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra
Aum Trayambakam
Ya}amahe,
Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam:
Urva Rukamiva Bandhanam.
Mrityor Mokshiye Mamritat
We worship Shiva - The Three-Eyed Lord. Whose eyes are the
Sun. Moon and Fire. Who is fragrant and nourishes all beings; May he
protect us from all disease. poverty and fear. And bless us with prosperity,
bngevity and health. May he liberate us from death. For the sake of
inmortality; As the cucumber is automatically liberated, From its bondage
from the creeper when it is fully ripens.)
